django_log.title: Django
django_log.description: Django request, security, and runserver log lines

runserver.pattern: ^(?:\[(?<timestamp>\d{2}/\w{3}/\d{4} \d{2}:\d{2}:\d{2})\]\s+)?(?<body>(?:Invalid HTTP_HOST header|Watching for file changes with StatReloader|Starting development server at|Quit the server with).*)

request_line.pattern: ^(?<logger>django\.request):\s+(?<body>(?:Invalid HTTP_HOST header|Bad Request|Forbidden|Not Found|Method Not Allowed).*)

sample.line: 2020-01-01 00:00:00,000 ERROR django.request Invalid HTTP_HOST header: 'evil.example'. You may need to add 'evil.example' to ALLOWED_HOSTS.
Watching for file changes with StatReloader
